evals.prompt: We sell freeze-dried dog treats in 4 flavors: chicken, beef, salmon, sweet potato. We want a 'flavor family bucket' so customers can try all 4 in one order. What bundle do you recommend and what copy should we put on the PDP?
evals.expected_output: A bundle definition table (flavors and units), bundle name, at least one PDP copy line and one cart line. Scope limited to the freeze-dried line.
expectations: The output includes a bundle definition with flavors and units (e.g. one unit per flavor).
The output includes a clear bundle name (e.g. Flavor Explorer, Taste the Range).
The output includes at least one ready-to-use PDP copy line.
The output includes at least one cart copy line or cart display description.
Product scope is limited to the freeze-dried line or the four flavors named.

evals.prompt: How do I set up a multi-flavor trial pack for pet chew sticks on Shopify? We have 5 flavors and want new customers to try 3–4 without buying full bags of each.
evals.expected_output: Structured trial bundle (which flavors, how many units), naming, PDP and cart placement, and a brief note on Shopify implementation.
expectations: The output includes a trial bundle definition (flavors and units).
The output includes naming and copy or placement guidance for PDP and cart.
The output includes a note on Shopify (bundle app or manual) implementation.

evals.prompt: We have 3 flavors of freeze-dried treats and margin is tight. Suggest a small flavor trial pack that doesn't require a discount—same price as buying 3 single pouches.
evals.expected_output: A 3-flavor trial bundle with no discount (sum of components); bundle name; ready-to-use copy; margin note.
expectations: The output includes a bundle with exactly 3 flavors or a 3-flavor option.
The output states no discount or same price as sum of components.
The output includes at least one ready-to-use copy line.
